draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Malhotra, an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of entrepreneurship. Mr. Malhotra is an entrepreneur of the highest caliber, and his innovative work in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation is truly groundbreaking. His unique blend of technical expertise, strategic vision, and leadership skills sets him apart as a leading figure in this field.

As the Associate Director of the Launchpad and Startups program at Gotham Tech, I have had the privilege of working closely with numerous entrepreneurs and startups, gaining deep insights into the qualities that distinguish truly exceptional individuals in this domain. My role involves transforming PhD holders into entrepreneurs, a critical initiative at Gotham Tech, particularly through the Launchpad Startup Postdoc Program. This program is designed to help PhD graduates leverage their technical expertise to build startups, particularly in Metropolis.

I have been with Gotham Tech since March 2022, progressing through roles from Community Manager to Assistant Director, and now Associate Director for the Launchpad and Startups program. My responsibilities include overseeing the development and management of startup projects, providing strategic leadership, and fostering an environment conducive to innovation and entrepreneurship. 

In addition to my role at Gotham Tech, I serve as an Advisor for Stream Therapy, a company focused on digital therapy for children with special needs, and as an Instructor for NYI I-Corps, where I support startups and entrepreneurial education. Prior to my current roles, I held various positions that involved significant leadership and development responsibilities. For instance, I was a Senior Program Manager at itravel, where I was involved in educational initiatives for MBA students learning about innovation ecosystems. I also engaged in business development, helping startups like Connecto and NTtechs expand their operations in the U.S.

My educational background includes an ongoing Executive MBA at Gotham Johnson Graduate School of Management, expected in 2025, and a Bachelor of Science in Social Entrepreneurship and Management from NYU, completed in 2018. This academic foundation, combined with my extensive professional experience, has equipped me with the skills and insights necessary to recognize and nurture extraordinary talent in the entrepreneurial field.

In my capacity as Associate Director of the Launchpad and Startups program at Gotham Tech, I had the privilege of serving as a judge for the prestigious Gotham Tech Startup Awards, where I first encountered Mr. Malhotra and his remarkable company, Launch AI Inc. The Gotham Tech Startup Awards are highly competitive, with approximately 80 startups pitching their ideas, but only the top five are selected for investment. This rigorous selection process ensures that only the most promising and innovative startups receive support.

As a judge, I evaluated numerous startups based on their potential for innovation, scalability, and impact. Launch AI Inc. stood out among the competition due to its groundbreaking approach to automating sales documentation through quantized local language models. Mr. Malhotra's vision and execution were truly impressive, and it was clear that his company had the potential to make a significant impact in the industry. As a result of this rigorous evaluation process, Launch AI Inc. was awarded a $20,000 investment at a $3 million pre-money valuation cap in a SAFE agreement. This recognition is a testament to Mr. Malhotra's extraordinary abilities as an entrepreneur and his innovative contributions to the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation.

Through this experience, I gained valuable insights into Mr. Malhotra's capabilities as an entrepreneur. His ability to identify a significant market need and develop a cutting-edge solution is truly remarkable. His leadership skills, strategic vision, and technical expertise set him apart as a leading figure in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation. Mr. Malhotra's ability to articulate his vision and demonstrate the potential impact of his technology made a lasting impression on the judging panel. His passion for innovation and commitment to excellence were evident in every aspect of his presentation.

Since the competition, I have continued to follow Mr. Malhotra's progress and have been consistently impressed by his achievements. Under his leadership, Launch AI Inc. has secured additional funding from top investors, including StartHub, City Innovation Lab, and NVIDIA. The company has also attracted major clients such as The Global Organization and Upwork, further validating the value and effectiveness of their solution. Mr. Malhotra's ability to drive growth and deliver results is a testament to his extraordinary talent and dedication.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Malhotra is an entrepreneur of extraordinary ability, whose innovative work in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation is truly groundbreaking. His unique blend of technical expertise, strategic vision, and leadership skills sets him apart as a leading figure in this field. Mr. Malhotra's contributions to the industry have already had a significant impact, and I have no doubt that he will continue to achieve remarkable success in the future. It is with the utmost confidence that I provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Malhotra, as he is truly a standout individual whose talents and achievements are worthy of recognition.

If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact me.

Sincerely,

Alex Cohen

Associate Director, Launchpad and Startups Program

Gotham Tech

[email contact here]
final:
Dear Reviewing Officer,

I am writing to extend my highest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Malhotra, an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation. Mr. Malhotra stands as an exceptional entrepreneur whose groundbreaking work in this specialized domain highlights his unique blend of technical expertise, strategic vision, and leadership skills. These qualities distinctly position him as a leading figure in advancing the capabilities of language models within the industry.

My role as Associate Director of the Launchpad and Startups program at Gotham Tech has given me extensive experience in nurturing entrepreneurial talent. I've had the privilege of working with brilliant PhD holders, guiding them toward entrepreneurial success through the Launchpad Startup Postdoc Program in Metropolis. My journey with Gotham Tech since March 2022 has seen me rise from Community Manager to Assistant Director, and now to my current role, where I engage in strategic leadership and support for startup projects. Additionally, as an Advisor for Stream Therapy and an Instructor for NYI I-Corps, I continue to foster innovation and entrepreneurial education. My prior experience as a Senior Program Manager at itravel, focusing on MBA student initiatives and business development for startups, has further equipped me to identify and cultivate exceptional talent in this field.

In my capacity at Gotham Tech, I had the honor of judging the esteemed Gotham Tech Startup Awards, where Mr. Malhotra presented his impressive company, Launch AI, Inc. This competition, known for its rigor with only approximately five out of 80 startups selected for investment, provided a platform for Mr. Malhotra to showcase his vision. His company's innovative approach to automating sales documentation through quantized local language models distinguished them as a leader in the industry. The award of a $20,000 investment at a $3 million pre-money valuation cap in a SAFE agreement is a testament to his entrepreneurial prowess and contributions to the field.

Mr. Malhotra's remarkable ability to identify market needs and develop innovative solutions has set him apart, not only impressing the judging panel but also leaving a lasting impact on the industry. Through his leadership and technical expertise, he has advanced algorithms that streamline the RFP process, placing Launch AI, Inc. at the forefront of innovation. This strategic approach has resulted in reduced resource expenditure and heightened accuracy in sales documentation, thereby establishing new industry standards.

At the helm of Launch AI, Inc., Mr. Malhotra plays a critical role in steering the company towards success. His strategic initiatives leverage quantized local language models to tackle complex challenges within the industry. By transforming traditional RFP automation methods, his vision has yielded solutions lauded for their efficiency and innovation. As CEO, he has cultivated a culture of excellence, consistently pushing the boundaries of what his team can achieve.

Furthermore, Mr. Malhotra has ensured that Launch AI, Inc. remains highly relevant and adaptable in the market. He is instrumental in guiding the company towards strategic partnerships and seizing market opportunities that resonate with its innovative ethos. By focusing on the development of flexible and scalable models, he ensures the company stays at the forefront of industry advancements, prepared to meet emerging trends and demands. His forward-thinking leadership continues to solidify Launch AI, Inc.'s reputation as a pioneering force in RFP automation, setting new benchmarks for the future.

Mr. Malhotra's leadership at Launch AI, Inc. significantly advances the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation. His innovative approaches and development of efficient solutions have set new industry standards and enhanced the precision of sales documentation. By demonstrating the transformative potential of these technologies, Mr. Malhotra has elevated his company and driven progress in RFP automation, setting benchmarks that guide future developments in the industry.

Additionally, Mr. Malhotra's involvement in high-profile events further underscores his contributions to the field. His role as a judge at prestigious competitions such as the Forest Innovation: India Challenge, Unicorn Duel, and Gotham Tech's Runway Startups reflects his influence within the entrepreneurial ecosystem. Each platform, renowned for its competitiveness and stringent selection processes, provided Mr. Malhotra with opportunities to support and guide emerging innovations. His insights proved instrumental in advancing projects with social, economic, and technological impacts, fostering a thriving environment for innovation in language processing technologies.

Through these distinguished roles, Mr. Malhotra has notably influenced the industry's trajectory, promoting a culture where innovation and practical application meet to revolutionize the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Malhotra exemplifies the pinnacle of innovation and leadership in the field of quantized local language models for RFP automation. His technical expertise, strategic foresight, and dedication to advancing this specialized domain are evident through his successful venture, Launch AI, Inc., and his influential roles in prestigious judging panels. These experiences highlight his ability to lead transformative technological advancements while simultaneously supporting and cultivating promising talent in the entrepreneurial ecosystem. It is with utmost confidence that I recommend Mr. Malhotra as an exceptional candidate, poised to make further significant contributions to the field and drive innovation forward on a global scale.

If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact me.

Respectfully submitted,

Alex Cohen
Associate Director, Launchpad and Startups Program
Gotham Tech
[email contact here]
